To my dear Fabiana,

To my dear Fabiana 💌

everything you love, gathered in one place

❀
F
for fabiana, with love

To my Querida, my Fabiana Rodrigues,

I have started this letter a hundred times in my head, in the quiet moments between everything, in the spaces where my mind wanders and always, always finds its way back to you, I never quite knew how to hold everything I feel into something as small and fragile as words, but I want to try, I need to try, because you deserve to know exactly what you are to me and I refuse to let another day pass where you might not know,

I remember the first time I really saw you, not just the symmetry of your face, though God, your face, the way it is so perfectly and effortlessly itself, not just that, but the way you existed in that room without trying to, I was sick, I felt terrible, and you sat next to me and even then, even in that fog, something in me recognised something in you, like a chord resolving, like coming in from the cold, I didn't talk to you the way I wanted to and I think some part of me has been making up for that ever since,

Because when we finally found our way to each other, really found each other, that second semester where the world fell away and it was just us and every conversation felt like we were discovering something that had always been there waiting, I understood what it meant to feel known, you talked to me about everything and I talked to you about everything and somewhere in all of that I fell completely and I never climbed back out and I don't want to,

I want to tell you about the moment I knew, because you deserve to know it, it was new year's, you were in Madeira, the world was celebrating and I sent you something from the deepest, most honest place I had, and you responded the way someone responds to a friend, warm and lovely and completely unaware of what it did to me, and it hurt, querida, it hurt in a way that cracked something open in me and from that crack came the clearest, most terrifying realisation I have ever had, I loved you, I loved you with the kind of love that makes your chest cave in, the kind that doesn't ask permission, it just arrives and rearranges everything and I have never been the same since that night,

And I don't want to be,

There is a specific feeling I get when I think of loving you, it's strange and I've never told you this but it takes me back to something from my childhood, that specific scent in the air, the feeling of being completely alive and present and overwhelmed in the most beautiful way, like stepping into something sacred and not yet knowing the full weight of where you are, that feeling, that exact feeling is what you are to me, except you are better, you are always better,

I see you, Fabiana, I need you to hear that, I see you in all the ways the world rushes past,

I see you rubbing your eyes and I tell you to stop because I am terrified of you getting pink eye and because some quiet part of me loves having a reason to fuss over you, I see you nodding off in class and it is the most disarmingly soft thing I have ever witnessed, I see your big dilated eyes full of something so gentle and so deep that sometimes I genuinely don't know what to do with myself, I see the way your eyes go glassy when something moves you and I would burn the entire world down to protect whatever made them that way,

I see you at 2am, the version of you that most people never get, the one who starts to let the walls come down just a little, that night when you told me about your family, about what they expect of you, about the weight you carry so quietly and so willingly, I want you to know that I sat with that for days after, I still sit with it, I think about you and everything you hold and everything you give and I genuinely tear up, not out of pity, never that, out of the most overwhelming admiration I have ever felt for another person,

You worry that you aren't enough, I know you do, especially now with the exemptions, with the exams, with the path you've chosen which is one of the hardest paths a person can walk, and I need you to hear me when I say this, you are not average, you have never been average, the fact that you get back up, every single time, the fact that you went through modules that would break most people and you came out the other side and then went and got into VAC at Deloitte, Fabiana, do you understand what that is, do you understand what YOU are, I don't think you do, I don't think the world has given you the mirror you deserve yet, but I am here, and I am holding it up, and what I see is extraordinary,

You told me once that you want to help the women in Afghanistan and my heart just stopped, it physically stopped, because that is who you are, you carry the weight of your own life, the expectations, the exams, the distance, the career, and still your first instinct is to look outward and ask what more you can give, your soul is soft in a way that outweighs so much of the cruelty in this world and I genuinely believe that, you make things better just by being in them,

And you are beautiful, querida, I need to say it plainly because I know you won't always believe it, your jawline is not a flaw it is a feature it is yours and therefore it is perfect, your height is not something to apologise for, you look like something designed with intention, I remember seeing that picture your sister posted and I remember exactly what I felt and it was something close to reverence, in your pyjamas at home with no performance for anyone, you are the most beautiful thing I have ever seen, I want you to walk through this world knowing that,

There is a smell that belongs to you and only you, vanilla and something floral and something warm, I don't have a better word for it than home, when I close my eyes and think of safety I think of that smell, I think of you grabbing my arm with that intensity that catches me off guard every time, I think of your voice saying ohh my golly gosh and the way that phrase is so completely and perfectly yours that it makes me want to fold in half from how much I love you, I think of fritters and how we both knew exactly what we meant and no one else did and I think that is the truest metaphor for us, we understand each other in a language we made ourselves,

I think of our song, I think of the dreamland where we meet when we sleep, I think of New York, I think of the penthouse that belongs to us in the future I am already building in my mind, I want you to know that when I picture my future it is not abstract, it is specific, it is you in a Ralph Lauren apartment above a city that is too loud and too bright and absolutely perfect for us, it is caramel frappe mochas and bacalhau at a restaurant I am going to take you to one day, I am keeping that promise, it is a life we earn together and I am so motivated by it, you make me want to be better, not because I am afraid of losing you but because you deserve a partner who matches you and I intend to be that,

I want to apologise, genuinely and without reservation, for the moments I was a meany, for the times I dug my heels in when I should have listened, for the moments I was not considerate of your circumstances or your feelings or the very specific weight of being you, you have never deserved anything less than the softest version of me and I am still learning how to give you that consistently, I am learning to love you in the right balance, not to drown you but to water you, to give you exactly enough that you feel held and never suffocated, it is the most important thing I am working on,

And I know we have our moments, the miscommunications, the times we each felt unseen by the other, the distance between Bloemfontein and Johannesburg that is just geography and yet sometimes feels like more, I know we sometimes talk past each other about effort and trust and love languages and I want you to know I understand now that it was never about not caring, we both always cared, we were just learning the dialect of each other and I am a devoted student, I will never stop learning you,

I am not scared of the hard moments, I want you to know that, I am scared of losing you, that is my real fear, not the arguments, not the distance, not the misunderstandings, those I can work with, those I want to work through, what I cannot do is a world where you lose interest and move on because querida, there is no version of my future that does not have you in it, I would give up everything for that, and I mean everything, not as hyperbole, as fact,

So let me say this as clearly as I have ever said anything,

I love you, not in the way that flickers and fades, in the way that crackles, the way Virgo Groove plays and suddenly everything makes sense, in the way that scary upside down ride turned your cheeks red and you looked so terrifyingly beautiful I couldn't breathe, in the way that 2am conversations are sacred, in the way that stops me in the middle of whatever I'm doing and reminds me that you exist and that I get to love you and that is the most astonishing privilege of my life,

You are going to pass those exams, you are going to climb that ladder, you are going to live in that penthouse and you are going to do it while being exactly who you are, soft and resilient and outrageously kind and completely irreplaceable, and I am going to be right there, not behind you, beside you, always,

I promise you devotion, I promise you a love that fights for you every single time, I promise you that the bad moments will never make me question the answer, the answer has always been you, it was you when I was sick in a hardware class and couldn't talk to you properly, it was you at midnight on New Year's when I understood what heartache meant, it was you at 2am when I sat with the weight of everything you carry and loved you more for it, it is you now, and it will be you,

Switch your brain off, querida, just for a moment, let someone else carry it, let me carry it, you are so loved, you are so seen, you are everything,

Yours completely and without condition,

Your love ♡

✦ all the things you love ✦

every image, every moment, gathered here for you
